characters.name: Aleksander Cirko
characters.description: Aleksander Cirkowas played by Rade Serbedzija. He was an evolutionary biologist and a student ofAlfred Kessler. He worked for the government and realised the threat that came from the Species. He made sure, that it was treated as a serious threat, but also made sure the investigation should be kept secret to prevent panic. He andLaura Daughterywere originally antagonistic towards each other, because of his policy to maintain the Species in secret, but in time he also respected her for her good work regarding the investigation of the Species. He was murdered byDavis Leebecause he had discovered the origins of the species. In time, he realized that he was being played and that Davis Lee and his men wanted the threat of the Species kept in secret for obscure reasons. He arranged all of his work to be sent to Laura through his assistant so that she could continue, what he began in the hopes of stopping the threat he had recognized.

characters.name: Alfred Kessler
characters.description: Alfred Kessleris the mysterious man behind the creation of the creatures. His face cannot be seen, but Lee talks to him. He wants to make sure, that the creatures are maintained secret. He also murders for that purpose and it seems they are part of a plan developed by him to destroy the world as we know it while preserving its creatures like Noah´s ark. The reasons behind his actions are unclear.

characters.name: Caitlin Blum
characters.description: Caitlin BlumSection HeaderNameCaitlin BlumAge16Portrayed byLinsey GodfreyStatusaliveCaitlin BlumisMiles Barnett'sgirlfriend and is played byLinsey Godfrey. They met each other at theOceanographic Institute. She is the daughter ofDoctor Blumand establishes a close relationship with Miles to the extent, that, in certain areas, he trusts her more than his own family. During the Tsunami he went back to Wilmington, when he found out, that she had been left behind because of a criminal, who had robbed her machine and left her there unconscious in his quest to escape the tsunami. While fleeing from the Tsunami she and Miles met Doctor Daughtery and Richard Connelly. Together with Nim they watch the New World that the creatures created with their actions planned by Kessler.

characters.name: Davis Lee
characters.description: Davis Leewas a government official. He killed for a shadowy group to make sure, that this species continues to be kept secret. This organisation is led byAlfred Kessler. In this quest he was hunting Laura and Rich. It turns out he was a clone created by Kessler and it were Laura and Rich who helped him realise that. In gratitude he didn´t kill Laura, when he had the chance.

characters.name: Laura Daughtery
characters.description: Laura DaughterySection HeaderNameLaura DaughteryStatusalive Laura Daughtery was played byLake Bell. She is a marine biologist. She is divorced, but has a son with her ex-husband.

characters.name: Laura Daughtery
characters.description: Laura DaughterySection HeaderNameLaura DaughteryStatusalive Laura Daughtery was played byLake Bell. She is a marine biologist. She is divorced, but has a son with her ex-husband.

characters.name: Miles James Barnett
characters.description: Miles James Barnettwas played byCarter Jenkins. Miles BarnettSection HeaderNameMiles James BarnettAge16Portrayed byCarter JenkinsStatusAlive Miles found several eggs while he was in the sea. He brought one of them home and put it in his family's fish tank, where it hatched. After eating all the fish, it exploded the tank and escaped. He caught the creature with the help of his best friendPhil. He named itNimrod(often shortened to Nim). They fed Nimrod and for a while hid him from their parents. Miles' parents later find out after Nimrod eats a dog. In a crazy series of events, Miles is finally forced to release Nim into the ocean. But to do this, he steals a car. He is then sentenced to six months parole.

characters.name: Nimrod
characters.description: NimrodSection HeaderStatusaliveNimrodis an (A-Sexual) member of the mysterious species that Surface revolves around. He was found byMiles Barnettwhen he was still in his egg. Miles hatched him, took care of him, and trained him with the help of his friendPhil. He is completely loyal to Miles and even saves his life when he was bitten by another one of his species. A side-effect of this healing is that Miles received some of his abilities (electrical surges, primal communication with others of the species, and also possibly self-healing and swimming under water). He also helps Miles, when he is searching forCaitlinin his quest of saving her from the tsunami, which he achieves. He meetsLauraandRichlater, when the tsunami comes and they are all together, when they are contemplating the disaster caused by the tsunami they narrowly were able to save themselves from.

characters.name: Phil Nance
characters.description: Phil NanceSection HeaderNamePhil NanceAge16Portrayed byEddie HasselStatusalivePhil NancewasMiles Barnett'sbest friend. He helped him raise and protectNim. He was played by actorEddie Hassell.

characters.name: Phil Nance
characters.description: Phil NanceSection HeaderNamePhil NanceAge16Portrayed byEddie HasselStatusalivePhil NancewasMiles Barnett'sbest friend. He helped him raise and protectNim. He was played by actorEddie Hassell.

characters.name: Richard Connelly
characters.description: Richard Connellywas an insurance claim adjuster when one of the creatures killed his brother. He went "crazy" and lost his family and job.Richard ConnellySection HeaderNameRichard ConnellyAgein his 40's He established an alliance withLaura Daughteryto prove the existence of these creatures and later they are forced to fight for their survival, when the creator of these creatures,Alfred Kessler, sends his henchmen to kill them to maintain these creatures a secret. At first he thinks the government is covering up the existence of the new species, but later he realizes - through Laura - that they were created by a secret company controlled by Kessler. During the tsunami he meetsMiles, his girlfriendCaitlinandNim. They all survive the tsunami and look at a devastated and flooded Wilmington.

characters.name: Savannah Barnett
characters.description: Savannah Barnettwas played byLeighton Meester.Savannah BarnettSection HeaderNameSavannah BarnettAge17Portrayed byLeighton Meester She isMiles Barnett'solder sister. She lives with her family inWilmington, North Carolina. She andMileshad a rivalry, but in time, however, through Mile´s actions she becomes more and more of a caring, responsible person, who broke up with her boyfriend, when she realised he was a bully and a jerk. She fled Wilmington before the tsunami came.
